creator: ats@first.gmd.de
text:
gdcd can no longer be found under the "old" URL given in the Makefile
for the MASTERSITE. It is now at
http://gdcd.undergrid.net/source_archive/

Fix: 

Use the new URL as given above for MASTERSITE, gives the same checksum.
How-To-Repeat: Try to do a make fetch or make checksum without the file
in /usr/ports/distfiles.
